title: Understanding Automated Ebook Delivery After Crypto Payment: A Plain-Language Breakdown — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: In Nigeria, where PayPal is blocked, or in the Philippines, where Gumroad doesn't accept digital downloads from your country, selling ebooks and courses online is a frustrating puzzle. Even in the United States, platforms like Stripe and Payhip can turn away creators with 'unknown' or 'high-risk' profiles. But what if you could sell your digital products, and get paid instantly, without the need for PayPal or Stripe? It's not science fiction. With the right tools, you can automate ebook delivery after crypto payment, no matter where you are in the world. That's what we'll cover in this guide.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment is a game-changer for creators stuck with blocked payment processors or restrictive online stores. It's about leveraging the power of cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and others to turn your digital products into instant, global commodities. No more waiting for your buyers to receive their ebooks or courses; no more worrying about payment processors holding your funds hostage. With automated delivery, you're in charge of your sales and your customers' experiences.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Here's how it works: when a buyer purchases your ebook or course using a cryptocurrency, the payment is verified in real-time by a payment processor like NOWPayments. Once verified, our bot engine kicks in, automatically delivering the digital product to the buyer's email address. The entire process happens instantly, without the need for manual intervention or email confirmations. The buyer receives their product, and you receive the payment, all within a matter of seconds.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Our automated ebook delivery system is designed specifically for creators who've been blocked by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. Whether you're in a country with restrictive online stores or you're a solo developer building a crypto-native digital product store, we've got you covered. Our system is built to be flexible, scalable, and easy to use, so you can focus on creating more content and growing your audience.
Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment is the key to unlocking global sales and instant delivery.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine, a $49.99 backend solution, is the heart of our automated ebook delivery system. It integrates with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and others. With the Core Shop Engine, you get automated delivery, payment verification, PDF receipts, and a full dashboard for managing your sales. It's the ultimate solution for creators who want to sell their digital products globally, without the need for payment processors like PayPal or Stripe.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

So, what's the next step? First, sign up for the Core Shop Engine and create your first digital product store. Second, integrate NOWPayments as your payment processor. Third, configure your automated delivery settings and test your system with a few sample transactions. Finally, start selling your ebooks and courses to buyers worldwide, and enjoy the freedom of instant, automated delivery. The era of restrictive payment processors is over; it's time to take control of your digital sales.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The most important question is: Can I sell ebooks and courses online without PayPal or Stripe? The answer is yes, with the right tools. Our automated ebook delivery system, built on the Core Shop Engine, allows you to sell your digital products globally, using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum. No more blocked payment processors or restrictive online stores; just instant, automated delivery and global sales.
The Core Shop Engine is a $49.99 backend solution that automates ebook delivery and payment verification, no payment processor account required.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for ways to sell ebooks and templates without the need for PayPal, Gumroad, or Payhip, you're not alone. Many creators have been blocked by these platforms due to country or profile restrictions. That's why we've built the Core Shop Engine, a $49.99 backend solution that automates ebook delivery after crypto payment. With our system, you can sell your digital products globally, using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum. Check out our online store at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see how it works.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with automated ebook delivery, follow these concrete steps: 1) sign up for the Core Shop Engine and create your first digital product store; 2) integrate NOWPayments as your payment processor; 3) configure your automated delivery settings and test your system with a few sample transactions; 4) create your first digital product and set up its delivery settings; 5) start selling your ebooks and courses to buyers worldwide, and enjoy the freedom of instant, automated delivery.
With NOWPayments, you can accept over 300 cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and others, without the need for PayPal or Stripe.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
